channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Azure MCP tools now ship built into Visual Studio 2022 — no extension required】Azure MCP 工具现已内置于 Visual Studio 2022 中 - 无需扩展
item.description: 【Azure MCP tools now ship built into Visual Studio 2022 — no extension required Azure MCP tools are now built into Visual Studio 2022 as part of the Azure development workload — no separate extension to find, install, or update. You can enable over 230 tools across 45 Azure services directly in GitHub Copilot Chat and m】Azure MCP 工具现已内置于 Visual Studio 2022 中 - 无需扩展 Azure MCP 工具现已内置于 Visual Studio 2022 中，作为 Azure 开发工作负载的一部分 - 无需查找、安装或更新单独的扩展。您可以直接在 GitHub Copilot Chat 和 m 中启用跨 45 个 Azure 服务的 230 多个工具

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.116】Visual Studio 代码 1.116
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.116 Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.116 中的新增功能 阅读全文

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.116】Visual Studio 代码 1.116
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.116 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.116 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Pin Clustering in .NET MAUI Maps】.NET MAUI 地图中的 Pin 聚类
item.description: 【If you've ever loaded a map with dozens — or hundreds — of pins, you know the result: an overlapping mess that's impossible to interact with. Starting in .NET MAUI 11 Preview 3, the Map control supports pin clustering out of the box on Android and iOS/Mac Catalyst.】如果您曾经加载过包含数十个或数百个图钉的地图，您就会知道结果：重叠的混乱，无法进行交互。从 .NET MAUI 11 Preview 3 开始，地图控件在 Android 和 iOS/Mac Catalyst 上支持开箱即用的图钉集群。

item.title: 【Stop Hunting Bugs: Meet the New Visual Studio Debugger Agent Workflow】停止寻找错误：了解新的 Visual Studio 调试器代理工作流程
item.description: 【We’ve all been there: a bug report lands in your inbox with a title like "App crashes sometimes" and zero reproduction steps. Your morning, which was supposed to be spent building new features, is now a forensic investigation. You’re 】我们都经历过这样的情况：您的收件箱中会收到一份错误报告，标题为“应用有时崩溃”，并且重现步骤为零。你的早上本来应该用来构建新功能，现在却变成了取证调查。 你是

item.title: 【One-click security scanning and org-wide alert triage come to Advanced Security】高级安全性中包含一键式安全扫描和组织范围内的警报分类
item.description: 【We're shipping two major capabilities that change how security teams enable and act on application security in Azure DevOps: CodeQL default setup makes it possible to enable code scanning across your organization without configuring a single pipeline, and a new combined alerts experience in Security Overview】我们正在提供两项主要功能，这些功能将改变安全团队在 Azure DevOps 中启用和处理应用程序安全性的方式：CodeQL 默认设置使您可以在整个组织中启用代码扫描，而无需配置单个管道，以及安全概述中的新组合警报体验

item.title: 【Why is there a long delay between a thread exiting and the Wait­For­Single­Object returning?】为什么线程退出和 WaitForSingleObject 返回之间有很长的延迟？
item.description: 【A customer reported that they were using the Wait­For­Single­Object function to wait for a thread to exit, but they found that even though the thread had exited, the Wait­For­Single­Object call did not return for over a minute. What could explain this delay in reporting the end of a thread? Can we do somethin】一位客户报告说，他们正在使用 WaitForSingleObject 函数等待线程退出，但他们发现即使线程已经退出，WaitForSingleObject 调用也不会返回超过一分钟。什么可以解释报告线程结束的这种延迟？我们可以做点什么吗

item.title: 【Choosing the Right Azure Hosting Model for AI Agents: A Deep Dive into Foundry Hosted Agents】为 AI 代理选择正确的 Azure 托管模型：深入探讨 Foundry 托管代理
item.description: 【AI agents are quickly moving from experiments to production‑critical components of modern applications. But while many teams know how to build agents, far fewer are confident they’re hosting them on the right foundation.】人工智能代理正在迅速从实验转向现代应用程序的生产关键组件。但是，尽管许多团队知道如何构建代理，但很少有人相信他们在正确的基础上托管代理。

item.title: 【DevOps Playbook for the Agentic Era】代理时代的 DevOps 手册
item.description: 【Practices, Principles, and Strategic Direction Software delivery has entered a new phase. AI agents are no longer confined to autocomplete suggestions in the editor. They are opening pull requests, generating code across multiple files, proposing infrastructure changes, responding to issues with working implementations, and executing】实践、原则和战略方向 软件交付已进入一个新阶段。人工智能代理不再局限于编辑器中的自动完成建议。他们打开拉取请求，跨多个文件生成代码，提出基础架构更改，响应工作实现的问题，并执行

item.title: 【.NET and .NET Framework April 2026 servicing releases updates】.NET 和 .NET Framework 2026 年 4 月服务版本更新
item.description: 【Welcome to our combined .NET servicing updates for April 2026. Let's get into the latest release of .NET & .NET Framework, here is a quick overview of what's new in our servicing releases: Security improvements .NET and .NET Framework has been refreshed with the latest update as of April 14, 2026. This update contains security a】欢迎使用我们 2026 年 4 月的组合 .NET 服务更新。让我们了解最新版本的 .NET 和 .NET Framework，以下是我们服务版本中的新增功能的快速概述： 安全性改进 .NET 和 .NET Framework 已使用截至 2026 年 4 月 14 日的最新更新进行了刷新。此更新包含安全性和
